location.name: Art appraisers in Jacksonville, Florida
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Jacksonville, Florida.

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Antiques, Furnishings, Decorative Arts, Paintings. With Member since 2012 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Antique Art Buyers
listedAppraisers.description: Antique Art Buyers provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Verbal valuations for paintings. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: B. Langston Estate Liquidation & Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: B. Langston provides estate liquidation and accurate expert appraisals for antiques and other valued items in Northeast Florida, serving Jacksonville and the surrounding area.

listedAppraisers.name: Bluett Art Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Bluett Art Appraisers is a boutique art appraisal firm based in Jacksonville Beach, Florida, run by Julia R Bluett. The company specializes in evaluating fine arts including paintings, decorative arts, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Duval Art Advisors
listedAppraisers.description: Duval Art Advisors provides fine art appraisals and advisory services to collectors and institutions throughout the Jacksonville metropolitan area.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare Books. With Since 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: First Coast Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: First Coast Art Appraisals serves the Jacksonville Beach and greater Jacksonville area with expert fine art and Florida regional art appraisals.

listedAppraisers.name: Fisher & Powell Personal Property Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: Fisher & Powell Personal Property Appraisers provides professional fine art and personal property appraisals in the Riverside area of Jacksonville, FL.

listedAppraisers.name: Florida Art Appraisals, LLC
listedAppraisers.description: Florida Art Appraisals, LLC provides accurate and unbiased appraisals of A.E. Backus, Florida Highwaymen and Indian River School artwork. While specializing in Florida Art, they appraise all manner of fine art including 18th and 19th century American painters, Latin American, Post-war and Contemporary Art. As an independent, accredited appraiser, not affiliated with any gallery or dealer, they guarantee the most accurate and unbiased appraisal possible.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in High-value Appraisals, Expert Witness Services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Hollingsworth Fine Arts
listedAppraisers.description: Hollingsworth Fine Arts offers fine art appraisal services serving Jacksonville, FL. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.description: Hudson River Gallery and Conservators offers fine art appraisal services serving Jacksonville, FL. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.
